three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 bearish pullback from Jun 2 ATH (30,776). Jun 2 made new HH with bullish close (96% position) but US500 barely confirmed (7,624.6 vs 7,624.1 = +0.5pts) — Bearish SMT at swing high = overextension signal. Jun 3 made HH+HL but closed bearish (-239.9pts, 73% bearish body, close at 5%) — ATH rejection candle. Jun 4 LH+LL continuation (-16.9pts, doji). Dealing range: 30,776 (Jun 2 high) → 29,718.7 (May 28 session low) = 1,057.3pts. Jun 4 close at 30,382.7 = 62.8% of range (Premium). Bearish FVG at 30,387-30,447.5 (Jun 2 low > Jun 4 high, 60.5pts, unmitigated).
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 price in discount after session drop to 30,018.5 (28.4% of dealing range). Bearish FVG at 30,387-30,447.5 acts as resistance ceiling. H4 bearish order block zone at 30,350-30,400 (Jun 4 distribution candles). Key support: 30,000 psychological + 25% Fib at 29,983. If broken, next target 29,718.7 (May 28 low / 0% Fib).
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: M15 session opened 30,367.8, dropped to 30,018.5 low, bounced to 30,569.6, then sold off again. Currently consolidating 30,150-30,200 with declining volume. Price below session open = bearish intraday control. NY AM Kill Zone NOT YET ACTIVE (current ~10:33 UTC, KZ starts 12:30 UTC). No M15 OB formed yet. WAIT for Kill Zone entry — monitor 30,000 psychological level for potential purge + reversal.

reasoning: NAS100 CFD pulling back from Jun 2 ATH at 30,776 after Bearish SMT divergence (ES showed weakness at NQ's new high, classic overextension signal). Jun 5 session dropped to 30,018.5 (28.4% of dealing range), approaching 38.2% Fib (30,122.6) and psychological 30,000. Bearish FVG at 30,387-30,447.5 caps upside. ORB score 60/100 — moderate bearish conviction, reduced from initial 64 due to discount zone positioning. Waiting for NY AM Kill Zone (12:30 UTC) before considering short entries.
